mapper.sql: r.recruitment_id, r.company_email, c.company_name, r.title, r.summary, r.content, r.requirements, r.job_category, r.recruitment_category, r.status, r.work_location, r.budget, r.image_file_id, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.contract_start_at, r.contract_end_at, r.recruitment_start_at, r.recruitment_end_at, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruitment_application ra WHERE ra.recruitment_id = r.recruitment_id AND ra.status <> 'CANCELLED' ) AS applicant_count

if.test: condition != null and condition.keyword != null and condition.keyword != ''

sql.if: AND ( r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR r.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR r.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') )
AND r.status = 'OPEN' AND ( r.recruitment_end_at IS NULL OR r.recruitment_end_at >= NOW() )

choose.when: AND r.status = 'OPEN' AND ( r.recruitment_end_at IS NULL OR r.recruitment_end_at >= NOW() )
AND r.status = 'OPEN' AND r.recruitment_end_at IS NOT NULL AND r.recruitment_end_at < NOW()

mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN r.recruitment_end_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, r.recruitment_end_at ASC, r.recruitment_id DESC
r.budget DESC, r.recruitment_id DESC
r.created_at DESC, r.recruitment_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recruitment ( company_email, title, summary, content, requirements, job_category, recruitment_category, status, work_location, budget, image_file_id, contract_start_at, contract_end_at, recruitment_start_at, recruitment_end_at ) VALUES ( #{companyEmail}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{requirements}, #{jobCategory}, #{recruitmentCategory}, #{status}, #{workLocation}, #{budget}, #{imageFileId}, #{contractStartAt}, #{contractEndAt}, #{recruitmentStartAt}, #{recruitmentEndAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE recruitment SET title = #{dto.title}, summary = #{dto.summary}, content = #{dto.content}, requirements = #{dto.requirements}, job_category = #{dto.jobCategory}, recruitment_category = #{dto.recruitmentCategory}, work_location = #{dto.workLocation}, budget = #{dto.budget}, image_file_id = #{dto.imageFileId}, contract_start_at = #{dto.contractStartAt}, contract_end_at = #{dto.contractEndAt}, recruitment_start_at = #{dto.recruitmentStartAt}, recruitment_end_at = #{dto.recruitmentEndAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE recruitment SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE recruitment SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM recruitment r LEFT JOIN company c ON c.email = r.company_email WHERE r.recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND r.is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM recruitment r LEFT JOIN company c ON c.email = r.company_email WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruitment r LEFT JOIN company c ON c.email = r.company_email WHERE r.is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM recruitment r LEFT JOIN company c ON c.email = r.company_email WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.company_email = #{companyEmail}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruitment r LEFT JOIN company c ON c.email = r.company_email WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.company_email = #{companyEmail}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO recruitment_tech_stack ( recruitment_id, tag_name ) VALUES
(#{recruitmentId}, #{tagName})
mapper.select: SELECT tag_name FROM recruitment_tech_stack WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} ORDER BY tag_name ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruitment_application WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND status <> 'CANCELLED'
SELECT company_email FROM recruitment WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND is_deleted = 0
